name: Ink Business Preferred® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 100,000 bonus points after spending $8,000 in first 3 months (worth $1,250 toward travel via Chase Travel or ~$2,000 transferred to partners)

earning_rates.notes: 3x points on travel (first $150,000 combined per year)
3x points on shipping purchases (first $150,000 combined per year)
3x points on internet, cable, and phone services (first $150,000 combined per year)
3x points on select advertising purchases (first $150,000 combined per year)
1x points on all other purchases (no limit)

other_benefits.name: Transfer Partners
other_benefits.description: 1:1 point transfer to Chase Ultimate Rewards airline/hotel partners including United, Southwest, Hyatt, Marriott, British Airways, Air France/KLM, and more

other_benefits.name: Chase Travel Portal Multiplier
other_benefits.description: Points worth 25% more when redeemed for travel via Chase Travel (1.25¢ per point)

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards at No Cost
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional cost

other_benefits.name: Trip Cancellation/Interruption Protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $5,000 per person for trip cancellation/interruption

other_benefits.name: Purchase Protection
other_benefits.description: Covers new purchases against damage or theft for 120 days up to $10,000

other_benefits.name: Extended Warranty
other_benefits.description: Extends U.S. manufacturer warranty by 1 year

sources.notes: TPG: Ink Preferred vs Sapphire Reserve

notes: $95 AF business card with excellent earning on business categories (travel, shipping, advertising, internet). Can combine points with personal Sapphire Preferred/Reserve for enhanced redemption. The 100K welcome bonus (when available) is exceptional. $150K combined cap on 3x categories is generous. Key business card for Chase ecosystem.
